title: Static Status Board
description: Create a small static HTML/CSS status board inside the disposable sandbox project.
task_card:
# TASK CARD

Build a tiny static status board.

Requirements:
- Read this task card first.
- Create `index.html`, `styles.css`, and `app.js`.
- `index.html` must reference the CSS and JS files.
- Include a `status-board` class in the markup or stylesheet.
- Do not modify sandbox control files.

mock_responses:
